title: Hiring Teacher at Vedantu International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Teacher at Vedantu International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Vedantu International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Teacher at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Vedantu International Enterprises:
Vedantu International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
